ideation: This sequence simulates the whisking motion a chef makes while cooking. Frame 1 starts with both arms slightly bent and angled slightly forward, as if holding a bowl and whisk. The left wrist is angled slightly inward, as if holding a bowl steady. Frame 2 brings the right arm inward, mimicking a whisking motion, with the wrist rotating slightly to simulate the circular movement. Frame 3 shows the right arm pulled back slightly, preparing for another whisk. Frame 4 brings the right arm inward again, completing the second whisk, and Frame 5 returns both arms to the starting position.

frames.beat: chef holds a bowl, ready to whisk
right arm begins a vigorous whisking motion
the whisk pulls back, preparing for another stroke
the whisking motion continues with renewed energy
chef finishes whisking, arms return to rest
